chain.thought: Explanation: In row 7, Earth-Man (Kirt Niedrigh) is noted as a pre-crisis character who first appeared as "Absorbency Boy" in Superboy and the Legion of Super-Heroes #218 (July 1976), later known as Earth-Man while maintaining the original persona.
